markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define KPIs and tracking for GrowthX's content marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Tracking Plan:** Panther will use UTMs on all GrowthX-published blog URLs to track direct leads in HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**Influence Reporting:** GrowthX will build a GA4 Exploration Report to show how blog traffic influences visits to key pages (e.g., Solutions, Case Studies), demonstrating content's indirect value.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [**CTA Strategy:** Panther will build blog CTAs with UTMs for granular conversion tracking. GrowthX will provide copy for these CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**Production Freeze:** A production freeze is currently blocking content publication. Ana will investigate the timeline for its removal.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)

## Topics

### Goal: Track Content's Impact on Leads

  - [GrowthX's Atlas platform will publish content to Panther's blog to build authority, drive traffic, and improve keyword rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [**Challenge:** GrowthX lacks visibility into lead generation and pipeline progression from this content.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**Objective:** Enable Panther to attribute leads and pipeline value directly to specific blog URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

### Solution: Direct & Influenced Tracking

  - [**Direct Lead Tracking (HubSpot):**](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Panther's HubSpot workflows already track leads by source via UTMs.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [**Plan:** Add UTMs to all blog URLs from the Airtable content calendar to attribute direct leads.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [**Influenced Lead Tracking (GA4):**](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [**Goal:** Measure content's indirect value by showing how blog visitors engage with other key site pages.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [**Method:** GrowthX will build a GA4 Exploration Report to track user paths from blog posts to pages like Solutions or Case Studies.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [**Constraint:** GA4 Exploration Reports have a 90-day data retention limit. GrowthX may need to export data periodically for long-term historical analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

### Solution: CTA & LLM Tracking

  - [**Call-to-Action (CTA) Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Plan:** Panther will build CTA sections for the blog. GrowthX will provide copy for these CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Execution:** All CTA links will include UTMs for granular conversion tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [**LLM Referral Tracking (ChatGPT, Perplexity):**](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [Panther has seen leads from ChatGPT and wants to track this source for new content.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [**Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
          - [**GA4:** GrowthX will filter Exploration Reports by referral domain (e.g., `chat.openai.com`).](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
          - [**HubSpot:** Allie will review the existing workflow that stamps LLM referrals to ensure it's functioning correctly for new content.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)

### Blocker: Production Freeze

  - [A production freeze is currently blocking the publication of new content.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Ana will follow up with the Pixel 1 admin to get an estimated timeline for its removal.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Allie:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - [Add UTMs to all blog URLs from the Airtable calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - [Review the HubSpot workflow for stamping LLM referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [Build the GA4 Exploration Report for influenced lead tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [Provide copy for blog CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**Ana:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [Investigate the production freeze timeline with the Pixel 1 admin.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [Coordinate with the Panther team to build the blog CTA sections.](https://fathom.video/share/DrsfwWeMynZyo13uN-r1vSesjzUKPqLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
